import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  let toks = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  for t in toks
    match string.parse_int(t)
    when Some(n)
      result = list.push(result, n)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  for y in sorted
    if not inserted and x <= y
      result = list.push(result, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, y)
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn read_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = read_or_empty()
  let line2 = read_or_empty()
  let a = parse_line(line1)
  let b = parse_line(line2)
  mut inter: List<Int> = []
  for x in a
    if list.contains(b, x) and not list.contains(inter, x)
      inter = insert_sorted(inter, x)
    end
  end
  if inter.len() == 0
    println("empty")
  else
    mut s = ""
    mut first = true
    for x in inter
      if first
        s = "#{x}"
        first = false
      else
        s = "#{s} #{x}"
      end
    end
    println(s)
  end
  Ok(())
end
